case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. JOSEPH SANFILIPPO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LEASE AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 71572842) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANFILIPPO, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 MASON STREET, #309 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 71572842)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SANFILIPPO, JOSEPH

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SANFILIPPO, JOSEPH DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 71515991), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SERVED NOV-28-2023, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SANFILIPPO, JOSEPH
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SANFILIPPO, JOSEPH DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 71515991), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SERVED NOV-28-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANFILIPPO, JOSEPH
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 71572842) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $0.00 PER DAY . (TRANSACTION ID # 71572842) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 71572842) AS TO DEFENDANT SANFILIPPO, JOSEPH
